ingredients.item:
200g (7oz) ground almonds
125g (4½oz) caster sugar
2 tbsp rosewater
1 tbsp orange extract
grated rind of 2 oranges
grated rind of 2 limes
1½ heaped tsp ground cinnamon
100g (3½oz) butter, melted
6 sheets (1 packet) of filo pastry
icing sugar, for dusting
ingredients.original:
200g (7oz) ground almonds
125g (4½oz) caster sugar
2 tbsp rosewater
1 tbsp orange extract
grated rind of 2 oranges
grated rind of 2 limes
1½ heaped tsp ground cinnamon
100g (3½oz) butter, melted
6 sheets (1 packet) of filo pastry
icing sugar, for dusting

ingredients.item: Combine the ground almonds, sugar, rosewater, orange extract, citrus zests, cinnamon and 50g (1¾oz) of the melted butter in a bowl until they form a thick paste.
ingredients.original: Combine the ground almonds, sugar, rosewater, orange extract, citrus zests, cinnamon and 50g (1¾oz) of the melted butter in a bowl until they form a thick paste.
